title: elymus humidorum
intro: Elymus humidorum, also known as the 'Chinese wild rye', is a species of flowering plant in the grass family, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Elymus humidorum include its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
